items.briefing:
Australian research firm UpGuard has found that illegal football streaming sites are linked to offshore betting operations, meaning Australians using pirate streams may unknowingly expose their personal and financial data to shady operators. Separately, scammers are selling seeds for AI-generated flowers that don't exist — a reminder that AI-generated images are increasingly being used to deceive everyday consumers into wasting money on fraudulent products.

Organisations using AI coding tools should also be cautious: researchers have demonstrated that fake bug reports can manipulate AI coding agents into introducing harmful changes to software projects at scale.

**Practical tip:** If you use AI tools for any work task, always review their output carefully — don't assume AI-generated content or code is safe or accurate without a human check.

featured.title: Barracuda warns of Microsoft phishing & malware rise
featured.quote: Attackers exploiting Microsoft pages to steal credentials poses direct threat to Australian businesses.
